sections.label: Fragments of Psalms: Psalm 27
sections.original:
Saluum fac populum tuum, domine, et benedic hereditati tu
æ
, et rege eos et extolle illos usque in aeternum.
Hal do þin folc, halig drihten,
and ðin
yrfe
eac eal gebletsa;
rece þu heo swylce and on riht ahefe,
þæt hi on worulde
wynnum
lifigen.
